subcodes.first_line: O thou who art striving for the welfare of the world of humanity! The contents of thy letter were in accordance with the facts.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ساعی در خیر عالم انسانی مضمون نامه مطابق واقع بود فی الحقیقه عالم انسانی
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @man's distinction from the animal, @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
